subject: GRB 130206A: Swift-XRT observations
submitter: Phil Evans at U of Leicester  <pae9@leicester.ac.uk>
body:
J.P. Osborne (U. Leicester), D.N. Burrows (PSU), J.A. Kennea (PSU), G.
Cusumano (INAF-IASF PA), M. Perri (ASDC) and P.A. Evans (U. Leicester)
report on behalf of the Swift-XRT team:

The XRT began observing the field of GRB 130206A at 20:27:46.2 UT,
3077.7 seconds after the BAT trigger. No source was detected in 1.9 ks
of promptly downlinked data. We are waiting for the full dataset to
detect and localise the XRT counterpart.
